creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 215262
v1

Moin moin 


kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade Qt5 to 5.15.0.
Lot's of fixes have already been committed to the tree, so this hopefully is more or less fallout-free (<=5 :D)

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/qt5-5.15.0.v1.diff


mfg Tobias
